tasks.label: MCP: Start filesystem server
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content .vscode/.env.agents | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '=') { $p = $_ -split '='; Set-Item -Path Env:$($p[0]) -Value $p[1] } }; npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem 'C:/Users/joost/OneDrive/Documenten/Projects'"

tasks.label: MCP: Start Playwright helper
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content .vscode/.env.agents | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '=') { $p = $_ -split '='; Set-Item -Path Env:$($p[0]) -Value $p[1] } }; npx @playwright/mcp@latest"

tasks.label: MCP: Start REST shim
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content .vscode/.env.agents | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '=') { $p = $_ -split '='; Set-Item -Path Env:$($p[0]) -Value $p[1] } }; node C:/Users/joost/AppData/Roaming/npm/node_modules/dkmaker-mcp-rest-api/build/index.js"

tasks.label: MCP: Start GitHub MCP (docker)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content .vscode/.env.agents | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '=') { $p = $_ -split '='; Set-Item -Path Env:$($p[0]) -Value $p[1] } }; docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server"
